slop_test.title: Slop Detection Audit — AI-Generated Content Quality
slop_test.description: Manual review to ensure no generic AI-generated boilerplate degrades submission quality.

items.evidence: All text is scenario-specific: 'Yusuf', 'Maria Silva', 'Gate 7', 'AT&T Stadium (Arlington, TX)'
Technical documentation uses precise engineering language. README focuses on mechanisms, not buzzwords.

items.check: No hardcoded 'TODO' or 'FIXME' comments in source
items.evidence: grep -r 'TODO\|FIXME' returns 0 results in app/ and lib/ directories

items.check: No non-functioning demo buttons or dead links
items.evidence: All buttons trigger state changes verified in manual E2E test. All Link components verified 200 responses.
Portuguese: 'Direcionar Fluxo do Portão 7 para Portão 7B' (correct). Arabic: 'انتبه: مسار المصعد في البوابة 7 مغلق' (correct). Spanish: 'Despliegue de seguridad en el Portón 7B' (correct).

items.check: Confidence scores and metrics are defensible from research
items.evidence: All metrics in EVALUATION_PLAN.json cite real papers. Confidence scoring uses documented formula with cross-validation factor documented in CHECKLISTS.json.

final_e2e_test.title: Full Demo Flow — E2E Verification
final_e2e_test.scenario: Gate 7 Crowd Surge — 38 minutes before Saudi Arabia vs USA kickoff

steps.expected: Page renders with IDLE status, 3 portal cards visible, no numbered headers
state.simulationStatus changes to 'predicting', operator log updates
SentinelAI panel shows 81% confidence bar, 'INCIDENT PREDICTION' badge, crowd congestion alert box

steps.action: Click 'Approve Action & Dispatch' on operator dashboard
steps.expected: state.simulationStatus → 'dispatched', Maria's task assigned in Portuguese, Luis's task in Spanish
Maria's emergency task card visible in Portuguese, dispatch timestamp from state, eco tip showing
Arabic RTL layout, active detour alert pulsing, SVG map shows detour path
3 shuttle options with wait times, eco-friendly badges on Metro options
Sustainability metrics panel with 3 KPI cards (78% renewable, 62% recycled, 44% transit)

steps.action: Toggle language to English in fan app
steps.expected: Layout switches to LTR, all content renders in English

steps.action: Return to operator, click 'Clear & Resolve Incident'
steps.expected: All tabs update: incident cleared, volunteers reset to idle, launcher shows RESOLVED status

regression_checks.check: Accessibility toggle persists when switching fan tabs
Language toggle persists when switching fan tabs
BroadcastChannel propagates within 500ms across all open tabs
Late-joining tab hydrates correctly from localStorage
Reset button returns all state to initial idle values
Console is clean (0 errors, 0 warnings) on all 4 pages
Production build passes (npm run build) with 0 errors
